title: Do not default to 'Ask anything...' search placeholders
summary: AI-generated search interfaces consistently use 'Ask anything...' or 'Search anything...' placeholder text with quick action chips below, regardless of the app's search domain or user expectations.
instruction: Use search placeholder text that reflects the actual content being searched ('Search emails...', 'Find team members...', 'Filter by name...'). Reserve 'Ask anything...' for AI-chat interfaces where free-form querying is the core interaction.
rationale: The 'Ask anything...' placeholder reflects the AI industry's search-as-chat default, not user expectations for most search contexts. Quick action chips below the search bar occupy space with untargeted suggestions before the user has typed anything.
violations: 'Ask anything...', 'Search anything...', 'What are you looking for?' as placeholder text
Quick action chips below search bar suggesting common queries
Magnifying glass icon positioned left within the input
Same search UI regardless of search domain (files, people, messages, products)
controls: Search without quick action chips below the input
Search bar embedded in context instead of a universal full-width element
Voice or natural language search only where appropriate
borderlineCases: AI-native products where chat-based search is the intended interaction model
contextualExceptions: Universal search across many data types where 'anything' is accurate
detectorSignal: A search input with generic 'anything' placeholder text, optionally with quick action chips below.
matcherProposal: Detect input elements with placeholder text matching patterns like 'ask anything', 'search anything', 'what are you looking for'.
detectorLimitations: Cannot assess whether the generic placeholder is appropriate for the search context
falsePositiveScenarios: Actual AI chat interfaces where 'Ask anything' is the correct prompt
mitigationStrategy: Flag as a suggestion to replace with domain-specific placeholder text.

fixturePlans.violation: Search bar with 'Ask anything...' placeholder, 4 quick action chips below, magnifying glass icon.
fixturePlans.control: Search bar with 'Search projects...' placeholder, no quick action chips, contextual results.
fixturePlans.borderline: AI assistant interface where 'Ask anything...' is the accurate prompt.

cleanRoomAttestations: Developed without access to proprietary prompt collections.
